repair_candidate.summary: Repair the existing #83041 contributor branch so config.patch/config.apply restart sentinel notices carry and format the actual restart-required state while preserving compatibility for older sentinel payloads. Keep #83041 as the only implementation lane and address current failing build/tooling/boundary checks plus any review fallout with the smallest branch update.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
What Problem This Solves

Repairs #83041 so the existing contributor branch can continue as the canonical fix for #46797. Current main still lets successful config.patch restart sentinel summaries read like an ok restart, while Windows/manual restart flows need the pending notice to say a restart is required.

Why This Change Was Made

Keep the fix at the config write/restart sentinel boundary: config writes should persist whether the change requires a restart, pending notices should say restart required, and startup-consumed notices should say restart completed. Older sentinel payloads without the new optional stat must stay readable.

User Impact

Users who approve config.patch/config.apply changes get accurate restart-required wording before restart and completed wording after startup recovery. Hot-reloaded config writes should not be mislabeled as restart required.

Evidence

Validation to run after repair: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/restart-sentinel.test.ts src/gateway/server-restart-sentinel.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/config.shared-auth.test.ts; pnpm check:changed. Source PR and credit remain with https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/83041 by @xuruiray.
credit_notes: Preserve #83041 as the contributor lane for @xuruiray; do not create a replacement PR.
Keep @xuruiray credited as the source contributor in the repaired PR history/body; Clownfish repair commits should be additive maintenance on that branch only.
